arguments.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\linus\git\graph_app\context-engine\install-tools.sh
@@
 tool_names=(
     viewer-ctl
     doc-viewer
     log-viewer
     spec-viewer
     ticket-viewer
+    copilot-capture-hook
     ticket-cli
     spec-cli
     audit-cli
     rule-cli
 )
@@
         spec-viewer) printf '%s\n' "memory-viewers/spec-viewer" ;;
         ticket-viewer) printf '%s\n' "memory-viewers/ticket-viewer" ;;
+        copilot-capture-hook) printf '%s\n' "memory-api/crates/session-api" ;;
         ticket-cli) printf '%s\n' "memory-api/tools/cli/ticket-cli" ;;
         spec-cli) printf '%s\n' "memory-api/tools/cli/spec-cli" ;;
         audit-cli) printf '%s\n' "memory-api/tools/cli/audit-cli" ;;
@@
         spec-viewer) printf '%s\n' "spec-viewer" ;;
         ticket-viewer) printf '%s\n' "ticket-viewer" ;;
+        copilot-capture-hook) printf '%s\n' "copilot-capture-hook" ;;
         ticket-cli) printf '%s\n' "ticket" ;;
         spec-cli) printf '%s\n' "spec" ;;
         audit-cli) printf '%s\n' "audit" ;;
@@
   spec-viewer
   ticket-viewer
+  copilot-capture-hook
   ticket-cli
   spec-cli
   audit-cli
   rule-cli
@@
-            append_csv_tools "viewer-ctl,doc-viewer,log-viewer,spec-viewer,ticket-viewer,ticket-cli,spec-cli,audit-cli,rule-cli"
+            append_csv_tools "viewer-ctl,doc-viewer,log-viewer,spec-viewer,ticket-viewer,copilot-capture-hook,ticket-cli,spec-cli,audit-cli,rule-cli"
             shift
             ;;
@@
 if [[ ${#selected_tools[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
-    append_csv_tools "viewer-ctl,doc-viewer,log-viewer,spec-viewer,ticket-viewer,ticket-cli,spec-cli,audit-cli,rule-cli"
+    append_csv_tools "viewer-ctl,doc-viewer,log-viewer,spec-viewer,ticket-viewer,copilot-capture-hook,ticket-cli,spec-cli,audit-cli,rule-cli"
 fi
*** End Patch

Use installed copilot-capture-hook binary in stop hook script with cargo-run fallback only when binary is unavailable.
arguments.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: c:\Users\linus\git\graph_app\context-engine\.clinerules\hooks\session-capture-stop.sh
@@
 WORKSPACE_SLUG=$(basename "$PWD")
 MANIFEST_PATH="memory-api/crates/session-api/Cargo.toml"
 
-if ! cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-capture-hook -- \
-    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
-    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
-    --trigger stop >/dev/null; then
+# Prefer the installed binary so hooks do not rebuild per invocation.
+if command -v copilot-capture-hook >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    CAPTURE_CMD=(copilot-capture-hook)
+else
+    CAPTURE_CMD=(cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$MANIFEST_PATH" --bin copilot-capture-hook --)
+fi
+
+if ! "${CAPTURE_CMD[@]}" \
+    --transcript-path "$TRANSCRIPT_PATH" \
+    --workspace-slug "$WORKSPACE_SLUG" \
+    --trigger stop >/dev/null; then
     echo "[session-capture-stop] Failed to persist transcript from $TRANSCRIPT_PATH" >&2
 fi
*** End Patch

data_json.content:
Implemented: the session capture hook now runs as a preinstalled binary instead of invoking Cargo on every hook event, and the install flow now includes that binary.

Changes made:
1. Added a full install target for the hook binary in [install-tools.sh](install-tools.sh).
2. Replaced Cargo-based hook invocations with direct binary execution in [​.github/hooks/hooks.json](.github/hooks/hooks.json).
3. Updated the clinerules hook config similarly in [​.clinerules/hooks/hooks.json](.clinerules/hooks/hooks.json).
4. Updated stop-hook script to prefer the installed binary, with a safe Cargo fallback if it is not installed in [​.clinerules/hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](.clinerules/hooks/session-capture-stop.sh).

Validation run:
1. Shell/JSON syntax checks passed for all edited files.
2. Dry-run install check passed:
   `bash ./install-tools.sh --dry-run --tool copilot-capture-hook`
   and it resolved to:
   `cargo install --path memory-api/crates/session-api --bin copilot-capture-hook --quiet --force`

Notes:
1. I intentionally kept a fallback in the stop script so existing environments continue to work even before tool installation.
2. Your full install flow now includes `copilot-capture-hook` in default/all installs.

Natural next steps:
1. Run `bash ./install-tools.sh --tool copilot-capture-hook` once on your machine.
2. If you want, I can also patch any other repo hook surfaces that still reference `cargo run` for this binary outside these two hook config trees.

1. Added install support for the hook binary in [install-tools.sh](install-tools.sh).

4. Updated clinerules stop-hook wrapper to prefer installed binary first, with fallback only if missing in [​.clinerules/hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](.clinerules/hooks/session-capture-stop.sh).
5. Updated the canonical agent stop-hook wrapper to do the same in [tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh](tools/agent-hooks/session-capture-stop.sh).

Verification:
1. Shell syntax checks passed for both stop-hook scripts.
2. JSON validation passed for both hook config files.
3. Installer dry-run confirms install flow now includes copilot-capture-hook.
